message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Class Diagram - SP02 CLASS DIAGRAM

package "controllers" {
}

class Application
class RelationService
interface Category
class TransactionService
class AccountService
class Family
class FamilyMember
class CategoryService
class Relation
class FamilyService
class AccountData
interface Account
interface Transaction
class MoneyValue

package "category" {
}

package "accounts" {
}

controllers --> Application
Application --> RelationService : has
RelationService ..|> Category
Application --> AccountService : has
Application --> Family : has
Application --> FamilyService : has
RelationService -- "category" : has\nimplements
Family --> FamilyMember : has list
Family --> CategoryService : has list
Family --> Relation : has list
RelationService --> "accounts"
FamilyMember --> Account : has list
CategoryService --> FamilyMember : handles
RelationService --> FamilyMember : handles
AccountService --> "accounts" : handles
AccountData ..|> Account
AccountData --> TransactionService : handles
TransactionService --> Transaction : handles
Account *-- Transaction : contains\nhas list
Transaction *-- MoneyValue : contains
Category <-- TransactionService
@enduml
```
